{{Quote|Oh, I'm not denying your talents, though I doubt the worth of ''this'' job. Career criminal though I am, what do I need with a hot ''freighter''?|Clawfish, to [[Cad Bane/Legends|Cad Bane]]|<ref name="Spices & Spies">{{TCWComicCite|6.15|Spices & Spies}}</ref>}}
'''Clawfish''' was a [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] [[Outlaw tech/Legends|outlaw tech]] who established the [[Event Horizon (Duro)|Event Horizon]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on [[Rrudobar]], an [[Space station/Legends|orbital]] [[City/Legends|city]] over [[Duro/Legends|Duro]]. He had but one remaining facial tentacle, and became enraged whenever inquired about it.

{{Char-stub}}
